titleStmt.title: SII 10.161: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 161. (A.R. No. 147 of 1917.) ON A STONE SET UP IN THE TEMPLE OF DANTĒŚVARA AT PRATTIPĀDU, GUNTUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1089.

summary.p: States that a Vaiśya named Nārāyaṇa gave a perpetual lamp and 55 sheep for its upkeep to the temple of Gaṇḍēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīpadmanābhanābhē rudbhū
taḥ padmabhū stadūrubhyāṁ
vaiśyā viśvōpakṛta stadvaṁśē
śrēṣṭhikāṭayō jātaḥ .
kommiseṭṭi riti khyātaḥ kī
¨rttinārāyaṇābhidhāṁ labdha
svasvāminaḥ prītyā tatpu
tra svakulāgraṇīḥ . Agra
ṇī śrēṣṭhiva¨rgāṇā magraṇī
¨rddha¨rmmaka¨rmmiṇāṁ penugoṁ
ḍapurēśānā magraṇī ¨ryya
śasāgraṇīḥ . Aniṁditā
kṛtē ¨rddhātā dātā guṇaga
ṇānapi mūlyagōtrēṇa
vikhyātaḥ khyātaśca dhanadā
nvayē . tasyābhū ddēvāṁbā
dēvāṁbā kaśyapasya sādhvīva
rūpaguṇaśīlayuktā
yuktā patyuḥ priyēṇā
pi . putracatuṣṭaya ma
bha ttābhyāṁ viṣṇō ¨rbhujāca
taṣṭayavatō Anuku¨rvva dva
¨rggayugaśrutipārāvārasa
ṁkhyānaṁ . kēśavavāmabhujāva
nnityaunnatyasphuratsuda¨rśanavā
n dvābhyā manujanmō bhū dvī
rō nārāyaṇa statra . rā
malakṣmaṇayō ¨rbhrātrō bhbhara
tō bhaktimā niva vidyacchrutipadhē
gīta bugvēdādiṣu sāmavat .
prādā dabhya¨rtthi naipatya mapatyavṛ
ṣabhadhvajaḥ nārāyaṇapriya
sta[smin®] sa ca nārāyaṇa stataḥ .

naṁdadvipābdapadaśītamayū
khasaṁkhyāsaṁkhyātaśakaśara
duttarasaṁkramāṇē Ācaṁdra
tāra mabha vāṁghrisarōja
bhṛṁgō gaṁḍēśvarāya sa
mayaccha dakhaṁḍadīpaṁ
Īyakhaṁḍadīpamunaku
beṭṭina goṟiya leṁbhadē
nu vīniṁ jēkoni prōliya
bōyinikini muduvapaku
ṁ buṭṭina koḍu kaina viddiya
bōyuṁḍu gaṁḍēśvarama
hādēvarakuṁ dana biḍḍa
biḍḍataramuna nācaṁdrā
¨rkkamu nitya māneṁḍu ne
yi naḍapaṁgalavāṁḍu
Ībōyinikē pattipāṭi
tū¨rppuṁ bolamunaṁ
du vṛttigāṁ beṭṭina cēnu
puṭṭeṁḍu Īdha¨rmmuvu
na keggu dalaṁcirēni
mahāpātakādidō
ṣamulaṁ borasina
vā raguduru
Digital edition of SII 10.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
